source xsim.dir/qr_binarize/xsim_script.tcl # xsim {qr_binarize} -autoloadwcfg -tclbatch {qr_binarize.tcl} Time resolution is 1 ps source qr_binarize.tcl ## run all //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// // Inter-Transaction Progress: Completed Transaction / Total Transaction // Intra-Transaction Progress: Measured Latency / Latency Estimation * 100% // // RTL Simulation : "Inter-Transaction Progress" ["Intra-Transaction Progress"] @ "Simulation Time" //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// // RTL Simulation : 0 / 1 [0.00%] @ "125000" // RTL Simulation : 1 / 1 [100.00%] @ "1295000" //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// $finish called at time : 1355 ns : File "/home/phuc/HWSWCK/qr_binarize_hls/solution1/sim/verilog/qr_binarize.autotb.v" Line 415 ## quit
